data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Guest privileges (bring friend once/month)', but the evidence does not confirm that this requirement is adequately covered. While the linked use case mentions that a guest pass allows a friend to use the member's credit once a month, there is no concrete evidence provided in the prior steps that demonstrates this functionality has been implemented or tested successfully. Therefore, there is a gap in the evidence regarding the fulfillment of this requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation or successful testing of guest privileges for bringing a friend once a month.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
